name: IRC_MANAGER_POSTS_V
query: SELECT EMPC.ACTIVATED_ON_DATE, EMPC.CAMPAIGN_CODE, EMPC.CAMPAIGN_DURATION_CODE, EMPC.CAMPAIGN_ID, EMPC.CAMPAIGN_LANGUAGE_CODE, EMPC.CAMPAIGN_STATUS_CODE, EMPC.CAMPAIGN_TYPE_CODE, EMPC.CANCELLED_ON_DATE, EMPC.CLOSED_ON_DATE, EMPC.CREATED_BY, EMPC.CREATION_DATE, EMPC.LAST_UPDATED_BY, EMPC.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, EMPC.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, EMPC.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER FROM IRC_CAMPAIGNS_B EMPC WHERE CAMPAIGN_TYPE_CODE = 'ORA_MANAGER_POST'
